_README: PERMANENT Wayond certification corpus. REAL observed messages ONLY — never synthetic (GFX-PKT-WAYOND-PARSER-CERTIFICATION). Each entry Nuno supplies becomes a fixed regression case. expected_type is the human-certified ground truth; the framework asserts the pipeline routes it safely (only ENTRY_SIGNAL may become tradeable). meta flags: is_edit / media / is_reply / stale.

messages.text: Remember we have NFP today at 14:30 CET so be carefull trading.
